message:
fix: improve close match detection for all architectures

- Changed match logic to mark any same-OS/different-arch as "close"
  instead of only specific arch combinations (amd64, arm64)
- This ensures armv7 and other architectures show as close matches
- Added test cases for armv7 matching scenarios

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -866,6 +866,28 @@ func TestParseAssetInfo(t *testing.T) {
 			wantVersion:   "",
 			wantMatch:     "none",
 		},
+		{
+			name:          "close_match_armv7_for_arm64",
+			assetName:     "ntm_1.4.1_linux_armv7.tar.gz",
+			targetOS:      "linux",
+			targetArch:    "arm64",
+			targetVersion: "1.4.1",
+			wantOS:        "linux",
+			wantArch:      "armv7",
+			wantVersion:   "1.4.1",
+			wantMatch:     "close",
+		},
+		{
+			name:          "exact_match_armv7",
+			assetName:     "ntm_1.4.1_linux_armv7.tar.gz",
+			targetOS:      "linux",
+			targetArch:    "armv7",
+			targetVersion: "1.4.1",
+			wantOS:        "linux",
+			wantArch:      "armv7",
+			wantVersion:   "1.4.1",
+			wantMatch:     "exact",
+		},
 	}
 
 	for _, tt := range tests {
